title: brassica juncea subsp. tsatsai
intro: Brassica juncea subsp. tsatsai, also known as mizuna or Japanese mustard, is a type of Asian green that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brassica juncea subsp. tsatsai include its potential to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer, as well as its ability to support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, added to salads, or used in soups and stir-fries to incorporate its nutritional benefits.
